news.title: Shopify shares slide despite Q4 revenue and EPS beat
news.summary: Shopify Inc (TSX:SH., NYSE:SHOP) shares were down nearly 13% on Wednesday, even as the e-commerce platform reported fourth-quarter revenue and earnings per share that exceeded analyst expectations.
